name: jq
description: JSON processor used by install/update scripts

name: hurl
description: HTTP testing tool for API contract tests

name: ngrok
description: Secure tunnels to localhost for testing webhooks and APIs

name: ollama
description: Local LLM inference server with OpenAI-compatible API

name: pandoc
description: Document converter used by render-pdf.sh to produce branded PDFs from Markdown. Also requires xelatex: brew install --cask mactex

name: librsvg
description: Provides rsvg-convert, used by render-pdf.sh to convert the project SVG logo to PNG for PDF headers
